canonical_answer: A person wearing a white shirt and black cap cuts food on a red cutting board near a stainless steel sink. An individual turns a knob on a white stove where a large grey pot sits on the front burner. Someone uses a metal garlic press over the red board before using a manual can opener on a metal can. Green walls and white cabinets surround the counter filled with spice jars and oil.
